props.headline: Talk through the public site you want to prototype.
props.body: Use this page to model lead capture, sales handoff, support routing, or project inquiry flows.

props.title: Tell us what should be on the site
props.body: The form block keeps public lead capture separate from generic forms.

items.label: Best for
items.value: Website, pricing, about, and launch pages

items.question: Does this form submit?
items.answer: No. Draftpine prototypes stay static, so the form models layout and copy only.

items.question: Can this become a sales page?
items.answer: Yes. Pair contact with pricing, FAQ, testimonial, and social proof blocks.

props.title: Where public requests land
props.body: Use locations for offices, service regions, event pages, or support coverage.

locations.address: Review teams across product, design, and marketing.
Static website prototypes and route planning.
Custom public-site block systems and audits.
